title: Brazil signs on to global climate deal to triple renewable energy | Reuters
description: Brazil has signed onto an agreement to triple renewable energy globally by 2030 and shift away from using coal, the country's Foreign Ministry said on Friday, joining a prospective deal backed by the European Union, U.S. and United Arab Emirates.
bodyText: Reporting by Valerie Volcovici and Jake Spring; Editing by Josie Kao Our Standards: The Thomson Reuters Trust Principles., opens new tab
